description: Global proficiency scale used across all capabilities. Defines 6 levels (0–5) with generic behavioral definitions. Level 0 means no exposure; Level 5 means strategic design and leadership.

fields.name: level_no
fields.description: Numeric level identifier (0 = no exposure, 5 = strategic leader)

fields.name: level_code
fields.description: Short code for the level (L0 through L5)

fields.name: generic_definition
fields.description: Generic behavioral definition applying to any capability at this level
fields.example: Understands the basics and can support simple tasks.

indexes.name: idx_level_scale_no
indexes.description: Primary lookup and ordering by level number

relationships.description: Each generic level maps to many capability-specific level definitions in capability_levels

sample_records.generic_definition: No working exposure; not yet ready for assessment or autonomous execution.
Understands the basics and can support simple tasks.
